meta.title: Seçkin Pools — Luxury Pool Design & Construction
meta.description: Bespoke luxury pool design, construction and maintenance for villas. We turn water into architecture.

hero.supporting: Luxury pool design and construction that turns water into architecture.

manifesto.body: We don't build pools. We shape the breath of a villa, the way light breaks on still water, the silence of morning. Seçkin turns water into architecture.

items.name: Construction
items.desc: Bespoke design and build, reading the site, the architecture and the light. Concrete, ceramic, infinity edge.

items.name: Renovation
items.desc: A second life for tired pools. Refurbishment, waterproofing and a move to modern systems.

items.name: Maintenance
items.desc: Constant care that keeps the water clear. Cleaning, chemical balance and seasonal upkeep.

process.title: From an idea to still water.

steps.name: Design
steps.desc: Site survey, 3D design and engineering. The pool becomes one with the architecture.

steps.name: Build
steps.desc: A site run with craft. Every stage transparent, every detail on record.

steps.name: Handover
steps.desc: Commissioning and delivery — followed by a lifetime of maintenance assurance.

products.title: With your pool for its whole life.
products.desc: From chemicals to equipment, lighting to automation — over 60 products under one roof.

proof.statement: Not the numbers — the stillness of the water speaks.

invitation.title: Let's design your pool together.
invitation.desc: An idea, a plot of land, or just a dream. We'll take it from there.

footer.tagline: Pool craft that turns water into architecture.

projectsPage.title: Every project, a story written in water.
projectsPage.intro: Not a portfolio — architectural case studies. From design to still water, see every stage.
projectsPage.ctaTitle: Let the next one be yours.

catalogue.title: With your pool, for its whole life.
catalogue.intro: From chemicals to equipment, lighting to automation. Presentation only — sales through our showroom and contact.
